steps.title: Identify roots from the factored form
Use the given point to set up an equation in p
steps.content: Since $(-4,0)$ is a zero and $-4\ne 3,7$, we need $-4+p=0$, so $p=4$.

steps.title: Compute h(0) and conclude
steps.content: $h(0)=(4)(-3)(-14)=168$. That matches the correct answer - D is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above is 168, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore D is correct.
